About Me

Who I Am

A curious mind at the intersection of data, AI, and real-world impact.

I am Thammana Sairam — a passionate data enthusiast who loves building things that matter. My focus is on Data Science and Data Analysis, combining strong Python skills with machine learning fundamentals to extract meaning from complex datasets.

I've engineered AI systems achieving 92.3% accuracy, built full-stack web apps with real-time analytics, and designed data pipelines that transform raw inputs into clear insights. Whether cleaning messy data or deploying a live application, I thrive on end-to-end ownership.

Currently seeking Data Analyst or Data Science internship opportunities to contribute, collaborate, and grow with a team that values data-driven decisions.

🧠 AI · IMAGE PROCESSING

AI Handwritten Similarity Detection
